# ThriveStack Marketing Telemetry — AI Instrumentation Guide
# Version: 1.0
# Hosted at: /marketing/llms.txt

---

## PURPOSE

This file gives AI coding assistants complete, executable instructions for instrumenting
any public-facing website or marketing site with ThriveStack marketing telemetry.
Every rule and example here is authoritative — follow exactly, do not deviate.

---

## HOW TO USE THIS GUIDE

Work through these phases in order. Do not write any code until Phase 0 is complete.

### Phase 0 — Understand the codebase first
1. Identify the tech stack and platform (Next.js, React, Vue, Nuxt, plain HTML, CMS, etc.)
2. Locate the most appropriate central file for injecting a <head> script tag across all public pages

### Phase 1 — Install the script tag
Add once to the correct central file. Follow STEP 1 exactly for the detected stack.

### Phase 2 — Verify then summarise
Run through the VERIFICATION CHECKLIST. Fix anything missing. Then output the summary.

**REQUIRED OUTPUT FORMAT — strictly follow this, no exceptions.**
Do NOT write a narrative summary. Do NOT output a "Summary of Changes" section. Do NOT describe what you did in prose. Do NOT create your own table format.
Your ONLY output after instrumentation is complete is EXACTLY the block below, printed inline in the chat. No files. No markdown files. No prose before or after it. No deviations. Copy it exactly, filling in Status and Notes.

---

ThriveStack Marketing Telemetry Summary
1/1 implemented

| # | Check                                                      | Status    | Notes     |
|---|------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|-----------|
| 0 | Script src is exactly the correct ThriveStack URL          | ✅/⚠️/❌  | Exact src used |
| 1 | Script tag in <head> on all public pages via central file  | ✅/⚠️/❌  | File used |

Unresolved: [anything skipped and why, or "None"]

Enabled Features:
- Awareness Report — Gain powerful insights into your marketing performance.
  https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/marketing-analytics/visitor-report

---
Handy ThriveStack Resources
- Setup Progress: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/onboarding/product-analytics/telemetry
- Diagnostics: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/diagnostics-report
- API / Audit Logs: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/events
- Developer Tools: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/developer-tool

---

## STEP 1 — INSTALL THE SCRIPT TAG

This is the ONLY step. Add once to the central layout or template file for all public pages.
Never add it inside an individual page component or template. Never add it multiple times.

### Next.js App Router (app/layout.tsx)

    import Script from 'next/script'
    export default function RootLayout({ children }) {
      return (
        &lt;html&gt;
          &lt;head&gt;
            &lt;Script
              src="https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js"
              strategy="afterInteractive"
              data-api-key={process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY}
              data-source="marketing"
            /&gt;
          &lt;/head&gt;
          &lt;body&gt;{children}&lt;/body&gt;
        &lt;/html&gt;
      )
    }

### Next.js Pages Router (pages/_document.tsx)

    import { Html, Head, Main, NextScript } from 'next/document'
    export default function Document() {
      return (
        &lt;Html&gt;
          &lt;Head&gt;
            &lt;script
              src="https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js"
              api-key={process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY}
              source="marketing"
            /&gt;
          &lt;/Head&gt;
          &lt;body&gt;
            &lt;Main /&gt;
            &lt;NextScript /&gt;
          &lt;/body&gt;
        &lt;/Html&gt;
      )
    }

### React (public/index.html)

    &lt;script
      src="https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js"
      api-key="%REACT_APP_THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY%"
      source="marketing"&gt;
    &lt;/script&gt;

### Vue / Nuxt (nuxt.config.ts or vue.config.js)

    // nuxt.config.ts
    export default defineNuxtConfig({
      app: {
        head: {
          script: [
            {
              src: 'https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js',
              'api-key': process.env.THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY,
              source: 'marketing'
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    })

### Astro (src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro or similar shared layout)

    &lt;head&gt;
      &lt;script
        src="https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js"
        api-key={import.meta.env.PUBLIC_THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY}
        source="marketing"
        is:inline&gt;
      &lt;/script&gt;
    &lt;/head&gt;

### SvelteKit (src/app.html)

    &lt;head&gt;
      &lt;script
        src="https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js"
        api-key="%PUBLIC_THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY%"
        source="marketing"&gt;
      &lt;/script&gt;
    &lt;/head&gt;

### Plain HTML / Static Site
Add to the &lt;head&gt; of the shared base template or every public HTML page:

    &lt;head&gt;
      &lt;script
        src="https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js"
        api-key="YOUR_ENV_VAR_SUBSTITUTION_HERE"
        source="marketing"&gt;
      &lt;/script&gt;
    &lt;/head&gt;

### WordPress / CMS
Add via the theme's functions.php, a header injection plugin, or the theme's header.php:

    // functions.php
    function thrivestack_marketing_script() {
      echo '&lt;script src="https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js" api-key="' . esc_attr( getenv('THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY') ) . '" source="marketing"&gt;&lt;/script&gt;';
    }
    add_action( 'wp_head', 'thrivestack_marketing_script' );

Rules:
- Write the API key to the environment variable file appropriate for this stack
  (.env, .env.local, .env.production, application.yml, etc.) — never in source code
- api-key must reference that environment variable — never hardcoded
- source="marketing" — always this exact string, never change it
- Place in the central layout file ONCE only — not per page
- Target only public pages; do not inject into authenticated/app routes unless intentional

---

## VERIFICATION CHECKLIST

Before delivering the summary, verify both points. Fix anything missing first.

- [ ] 0. script tag — src is exactly `https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js` — no variation, no substitution. Known wrong URLs to reject: any `cloudfront.net` URL, any `/v1/te.js` path, any URL that is not this exact string
- [ ] 1. Script tag present in <head> on all public pages via a single central file

### Summary format

Output EXACTLY this block directly in the chat as your final message — no prose, no files, no alternate formats, no additions or omissions.
Fill in Status and Notes only. Everything else is fixed.

ThriveStack Marketing Telemetry Summary
1/1 implemented

| # | Check                                                      | Status    | Notes     |
|---|------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|-----------|
| 0 | Script src is exactly the correct ThriveStack URL          | ✅/⚠️/❌  | Exact src used |
| 1 | Script tag in <head> on all public pages via central file  | ✅/⚠️/❌  | File used |

Unresolved: [anything skipped and why, or "None"]

Enabled Features:
- Awareness Report — Gain powerful insights into your marketing performance.
  https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/marketing-analytics/visitor-report

---
Handy ThriveStack Resources
- Setup Progress: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/onboarding/product-analytics/telemetry
- Diagnostics: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/diagnostics-report
- API / Audit Logs: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/events
- Developer Tools: https://app.thrivestack.ai/analyze/developer-tool

---

## HARD RULES

1. api-key from environment variable only — never in source code
2. source="marketing" — always this exact string, never change it
3. Add the script tag ONCE via a central file — never per individual page
4. Never hardcode the API key anywhere in source code
5. The env var name is recommended as THRIVESTACK_MARKETING_API_KEY
   (prefix with NEXT_PUBLIC_, PUBLIC_, REACT_APP_, etc. as required by the framework)
6. Script src must be exactly `https://ts-script.app.thrivestack.ai/latest/thrivestack.js` — never alter the URL. Known wrong substitutions to reject: any `cloudfront.net` URL, any `/v1/te.js` path, any URL that is not this exact string
